title: CHUCKYA RawProximity CBOR Schema
description: Compact binary schema for bracelet → phone BLE notifications. Integer keys minimize payload size.

6.name: sig
6.description: signal type: panic | auto_proximity | heartbeat | tamper

encodingNotes: Use CBOR major types with small integer keys for minimum payload size.
Negotiate MTU on BLE connect; keep payload <= MTU (typically 244 bytes).
If attestation (key 8) is present and large, send via separate read characteristic.
Distance (key 4) is float for sub-metre precision; direction (key 5) is uint 0-359.
Use COSE wrapper only if device-level signing is needed (secure element present).
